title: JFK Airport Parking Deals, Coupons & Promo Codes (2026)
excerpt: Save up to 70% on JFK airport parking with verified coupon codes, promo deals, and budget lot picks. Rates from $10.62/day with free shuttles to all terminals.
metaTitle: JFK Parking Deals & Coupons: Verified Promo Codes (2026)
metaDescription: Save up to 70% on JFK parking with verified codes like JFK319 ($8 off) and PARKJFK7 ($7 off). Compare off-site lots from $10.62/day with free 24/7 shuttles.
html:
How Much Can You Actually Save on JFK Parking?

Off-site parking near JFK starts at $10.62/day — that's 87% less than the on-airport garage rate of $80/day. For a typical 6-day trip, the difference between on-airport and off-site parking can be over $200. Combine that with a coupon code and you're looking at some of the cheapest parking near any major airport in the country. For a full overview of every parking option at JFK, see our Complete JFK Airport Parking Guide.

  • Cheapest off-site lot: PARK AC at $12.95/day with a 24/7 shuttle every 10 minutes
  • Best coupon code: JFK319 saves $8 on your total — works at multiple lots
  • On-airport pre-book rate: $36-$48/day (Red and Yellow/Blue Garages)
  • Biggest savings window: Book 2+ weeks in advance for the lowest dynamic rates
  • AirTrain summer deal: Half-price fares ($4.25 instead of $8.50) from June 30 through Labor Day

Verified JFK Parking Coupon Codes for 2026

These codes are confirmed active as of early 2026. Apply them at checkout on the lot's website or through a booking aggregator like Triply.

Pro tip: codes like JFK319 and PARKJFK7 work at overlapping lots. Try both and keep whichever saves more on your specific booking (verified February 2026).

Every lot below offers a free shuttle to all JFK terminals. Rates are verified through Triply and reflect current base pricing before coupons.

All lots include free cancellation when booked through Triply. Taxes ($8-$19 for a 6-day stay) are additional at most lots. The DoubleTree is a standout exception — $0 in taxes on the Triply rate (verified February 2026).

How Off-Site Parking Beats On-Airport Prices

JFK's on-airport garages charge $70-$80 per day at the meter. Even pre-booked rates run $36-$48/day. Here's how the math works for a 6-day trip for two travelers.

OptionParking CostAirTrain CostTotal
Yellow/Blue Garage (pre-booked)$288$0 (walk to terminal)$288
Red Garage T8 (pre-booked)$216$0 (walk to terminal)$216
Lot 9 Economy~$145$0 (free from Lefferts Blvd)~$145
ARB Parking (off-site)$102.78$0 (direct shuttle)$102.78
PARK AC (off-site)$85.76$0 (direct shuttle)$85.76

Off-site lots shuttle you directly to your terminal. That means you skip the AirTrain entirely. The AirTrain costs $8.50 per person one-way ($17 round-trip). A couple saves $34 in AirTrain fares alone by using an off-site lot with a direct shuttle.

At the cheapest off-site lot (PARK AC at $85.76 for 6 days), you save $59 compared to Lot 9 and over $200 compared to the garage.

5 More Ways to Cut JFK Parking Costs

Coupon codes aren't the only way to save. These strategies stack on top of promo discounts.

1. Book Early for Dynamic Pricing

JFK parking rates are dynamic. Lots raise prices as spots fill up. Booking 2-3 weeks before your trip typically locks in the lowest rate. Last-minute bookings can cost 30-50% more for the same lot.

2. Check Groupon for Bundle Deals

ARB Parking and PARK AC both run Groupon promotions regularly. These deals sometimes beat the standard rate even after applying a coupon code. Search "JFK airport parking" on Groupon before booking elsewhere.

3. Sign Up for Email Newsletters

JFK Long Term Parking's email list offers exclusive deals of up to 30% off. Bolt Parking's direct website rate starts at $18.99/day — nearly $8/day cheaper than the aggregator rate. Safe Park offers every 7th day free when you book direct at $24.95/day. Signing up for lot newsletters before your trip can unlock rates you won't find on comparison sites.

4. Use AAA or Membership Discounts

AAA members get up to 20% off at participating JFK lots. Military discounts, AARP rates, and corporate codes are also available at select locations. Ask the lot directly if they honor your membership before booking.

5. Time Your Trip Around the AirTrain Summer Discount

From June 30 through Labor Day, the AirTrain fare drops 50% to $4.25 per person one-way (down from $8.50). This discount was introduced to ease road congestion during peak JFK construction. If you're using Lot 9 Economy or taking the AirTrain from a subway connection, summer is the cheapest window.

Watch Out for These Hidden Costs

The advertised daily rate isn't always your final price. Watch for these extras before you book.

  • Taxes and fees: Most off-site lots add $8-$19 in taxes for a 6-day stay. The DoubleTree by Hilton is an exception with $0 tax on Triply bookings.
  • SUV surcharges: ARB Parking charges $5/day extra for small SUVs and $7/day for large SUVs or trucks. That adds $30-$42 to a 6-day stay.
  • Limited shuttle hours: Parking 4 Airport has no shuttle between 9 PM and 5:15 AM. If your flight arrives late, you'll need an Uber or Lyft from the airport. Budget an extra $15-$25 for that ride.
  • Valet key requirements: Most JFK off-site lots are valet-only. You must leave your keys. If that makes you uncomfortable, PARK AC is one of the few self-park options.
  • Prepaid vs. pay-at-location: Prepaid lots (DoubleTree, Parking 4 Airport) often have lower rates but no refund flexibility. Pay-at-location lots give you more wiggle room if plans change.

JFK Parking Deals vs. Other Airport Transportation

Parking isn't always the cheapest way to get to JFK. Here's how it stacks up against other options for a couple on a 6-day trip.

  • Off-site parking (PARK AC): $85.76 total — drive yourself, park, shuttle to terminal
  • Subway + AirTrain: $45.60 total ($11.40/person each way) — but 60-90 minutes each way with luggage
  • LIRR + AirTrain: $54.00 total (off-peak) — 35-45 minutes each way, more comfortable
  • Taxi (flat rate): $140+ round-trip ($70 each way plus $5 peak surcharge and $6-$9.50 tolls)
  • Uber/Lyft: $100-$300 round-trip depending on surge pricing

For two travelers with luggage on a multi-day trip, off-site parking is almost always the best value. You get door-to-terminal convenience without surge pricing or weather-dependent transit delays.

Construction Alert: Plan Extra Time in 2026

JFK is in the middle of a $19 billion redevelopment — the largest in its history. New Terminal One ($9.5B) opens Phase 1 in June 2026. Terminal 6 ($4.2B) is also opening its first gates in 2026. Terminal 7 is scheduled for demolition. About 50 airlines are expected to change terminals this year.

What this means for parking: roadway construction is causing significant delays getting into the airport. Multiple parking lots recommend arriving 3 hours before your flight instead of the usual 2. Book your JFK parking spot early on Triply so you're not scrambling for availability on top of construction delays.

How Do I Find the Best JFK Parking Deal?

Start by comparing current rates on Triply. Enter your travel dates to see real-time pricing across all JFK off-site lots. Then try applying a coupon code — JFK319 ($8 off) or PARKJFK7 ($7 off) — at checkout. Check Groupon and lot direct-booking sites for potentially lower rates. For the absolute cheapest option, book PARK AC 2-3 weeks in advance with the PARKJFK7 code. With free cancellation on most lots, there's no risk in locking in a rate early and rebooking if you find something better.

Compare JFK parking deals and reserve your spot today — prices go up as lots fill, and 2026 construction is making spots scarcer than usual.

faqItems.question: What is the cheapest parking near JFK Airport?
faqItems.answer: PARK AC offers the lowest daily rate at $12.95/day with a free 24/7 shuttle to all terminals every 10 minutes. For a 6-day trip, that comes to $85.76 including taxes. Apply the PARKJFK7 coupon code for an additional $7 off.

faqItems.question: Do JFK parking coupon codes actually work?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Codes like JFK319 ($8 off) and PARKJFK7 ($7 off) are verified and active as of early 2026. They work at multiple off-site lots including ARB Parking, Bolt Parking, Purchase Park 2 Fly, and PARK AC. Apply them at checkout through the lot's direct website or a booking aggregator.

faqItems.question: Is it cheaper to park off-site or use the JFK economy lot?
faqItems.answer: Off-site is cheaper. JFK's Lot 9 Economy costs about $145 for 6 days. PARK AC costs $85.76 for the same period — a savings of roughly $59. Both options include a free shuttle to terminals.

faqItems.question: Are there any free parking options at JFK?
faqItems.answer: JFK has two free cell phone lots where drivers can wait for arriving passengers, but the driver must remain with the vehicle at all times. There is no free long-term or overnight parking at JFK. The cheapest option is off-site parking starting at $10.62/day.
